name: Freelancers (1)
text: You may produce 1 unit in this system with its cost reduced by 1; you may spend influence as if it were resources to produce that unit.
flavorText: As part of the annexation agreement, local artisans would be well paid to lay the groundwork for military installations in the newly acquired territories.

name: Freelancers (2)
text: You may produce 1 unit in this system with its cost reduced by 1; you may spend influence as if it were resources to produce that unit.
flavorText: Overseer Klix was known for hiring hundreds of freelancers and then "forgetting" to pay them once the bulk of the work was complete.

name: Freelancers (3)
text: You may produce 1 unit in this system with its cost reduced by 1; you may spend influence as if it were resources to produce that unit.
flavorText: The Vexis Howlers were well-equipped with transports, powered armor, and even logistical support—everything a fledgling outpost needed to survive.

name: Demilitarized Zone
text:
Remove units from this planet and place them on another planet you control. Ground forces may instead be placed in the space area of this system.

ATTACH: Units cannot be committed to, produced on, or placed on this planet. During the agenda phase, this planet's planet card can be traded as part of a transaction.

name: Abandoned Warehouses (1)
text: You gain 1 trade good and may convert 1 of your commodities to a trade good. Then, you gain 1 commodity for each industrial planet you control.
flavorText: Far beneath the storm-wracked seas, vast storage tanks drifted in the lightless depths.

name: Abandoned Warehouses (2)
text: You gain 1 trade good and may convert 1 of your commodities to a trade good. Then, you gain 1 commodity for each industrial planet you control.
flavorText: Looks like some smuggler hid their shipment of gerr root here and forgot to pick it up.

name: Abandoned Warehouses (3)
text: You gain 1 trade good and may convert 1 of your commodities to a trade good. Then, you gain 1 commodity for each industrial planet you control.
flavorText: Suffi An drifted into the derelict orbital and brushed her suited hand across the inner hatch controls. A light glowed, and she smiled. The stasis seals were still operational.

name: Abandoned Warehouses (4)
text: You gain 1 trade good and may convert 1 of your commodities to a trade good. Then, you gain 1 commodity for each industrial planet you control.
flavorText: The storage silos had been half buried in sand dunes, sealed enviro-doors hiding the stockpiles within.
